close_reason: GC work complete (.11.31, .11.32 closed); remaining children re-homed to fz-ul4.14 (.11.22/.11.23) and fz-ul4 (.11.26-.11.29)
description:
Replace Rc with a real tracing GC. Likely a stop-the-world mark-sweep first; generational/incremental later.

Vectors should be off-the-managed-heap or pinned (no copy of large contiguous data).

comments.text: Scope addition (approved 2026-05-09): the tagged 64-bit Value representation (NaN-box vs low-bit tag) was originally on .12.2's plate, but with .12 having zero heap types, there's nothing to tag. The boundary ABI design — including the tagged-Value layout, GC barrier strategy, and how compiled code holds heap pointers across calls — moves here, alongside the GC itself.

title: Tracing GC
